prayoga.literature_text: na me jAnAti sattvaM vA praBAvaM vA
uBO tO na vijAnIto nAyaM hanti na hanyate
jAnAsi hi yaTA BIru strIRAM yOvanamaDruvam
te pratijAnAmi hatO tO vidDi rAkzasO
yAvajjAnAmi vEdehIM yadi jIvati vA na
tava sattvaM balaM cEva vijAnAmi mahAkape
jAnAmi gamane SaktiM nayane cApi te mama
diSo na jAne na laBe ca Sarma
mAmevEzyasi satyaM te pratijAne priyo'si me
asaMSayaM samagraM mAM yaTA jYAsyasi tacCfRu
na tvaM dfzwvA na punaralakAM jYAsyase kAmacArin
kOnteya pratijAnIhi na me BaktaH praRaSyati
tAM jAnITAH parimitakaTAM jIvitaM me dvitIyaM
